# Homes With Manish — East Bay Real Estate

> Manish Anand (CA DRE #02247006, REeBroker Group) is a data-driven real estate
> agent serving 8 East Bay / Tri-Valley cities in California: San Ramon,
> Pleasanton, Danville, Dublin, Livermore, Fremont, Tracy, and Mountain House.
> The site publishes live market data (Zillow ZHVI/ZORI, Freddie Mac PMMS),
> hyperlocal city guides, and free calculators. Contact: (408) 707-5324,
> homeswithmanish@gmail.com.

## City Guides
- [Living in San Ramon, CA](https://homeswithmanish.com/cities/san-ramon/): Top schools, master-planned living, and Bishop Ranch careers. Median SFH $1.5M–$1.8M.
- [Living in Pleasanton, CA](https://homeswithmanish.com/cities/pleasanton/): Historic downtown charm with top-5% schools. Median SFH $1.6M–$2.1M.
- [Living in Danville, CA](https://homeswithmanish.com/cities/danville/): The Tri-Valley's premier luxury market. Median SFH $2M+.
- [Living in Dublin, CA](https://homeswithmanish.com/cities/dublin/): New construction, BART access, and rising schools. Median SFH $1.4M–$1.7M.
- [Living in Livermore, CA](https://homeswithmanish.com/cities/livermore/): Wine country value on the Tri-Valley's east edge. Median SFH $1.2M–$1.5M.
- [Living in Fremont, CA](https://homeswithmanish.com/cities/fremont/): Silicon Valley access with legendary Mission schools. Median SFH $1.4M–$2M+.
- [Living in Tracy, CA](https://homeswithmanish.com/cities/tracy/): The East Bay corridor's most attainable homes. Median SFH $650K–$750K.
- [Living in Mountain House, CA](https://homeswithmanish.com/cities/mountain-house/): A brand-new city built for Bay Area families. Median SFH $800K–$1M.

## Calculators (free, no signup)
- [Home Affordability Calculator (East Bay Edition)](https://homeswithmanish.com/calculators/affordability/): Free home affordability calculator tuned for East Bay buyers. Estimate your maximum purchase price from income, debts, down payment, and today's rates.
- [Buy vs Rent Calculator for the East Bay](https://homeswithmanish.com/calculators/buy-vs-rent/): Buy vs rent calculator built for Bay Area price-to-rent ratios. Compare the true 5–10 year cost of owning vs renting in San Ramon, Dublin, Tracy and beyond.
- [California Closing Cost Calculator (Buyer)](https://homeswithmanish.com/calculators/closing-costs/): Estimate buyer closing costs in Alameda, Contra Costa, and San Joaquin counties: escrow, title, lender fees, and prepaids for East Bay home purchases.
- [California Property Tax Estimator (East Bay & Tracy)](https://homeswithmanish.com/calculators/property-tax/): Estimate property taxes for San Ramon, Dublin, Pleasanton, Tracy, Mountain House and more — including Mello-Roos/CFD assessments and the supplemental tax bill.
- [Down Payment Planner](https://homeswithmanish.com/calculators/down-payment/): Plan your down payment for an East Bay home: savings timeline, closing-cost cushion, and PMI trade-offs for buying with less than 20% down.
- [Sell-to-Net Calculator (Seller's Net → List Price)](https://homeswithmanish.com/calculators/sell-to-net/): Work backward from the cash you want to walk away with to the right list price. Estimate East Bay seller net proceeds after commission, closing costs, and loan payoff.

## Data & Resources
- [Machine-readable city dataset (JSON)](https://homeswithmanish.com/cities/data.json): prices, schools, commutes, FAQs for all 8 cities
- [Live market data](https://homeswithmanish.com/#market): Zillow ZHVI medians per city, updated monthly
- [Blog](https://homeswithmanish.com/blog/): hyperlocal guides (schools, neighborhoods, buying process)
- [Full content for LLMs](https://homeswithmanish.com/llms-full.txt)
